npcs.name: Ray Patches Liu
npcs.location: The Sprawl — deep service alleys east of the Ashgate blocks, no fixed stop
npcs.notes: Recognized Ghost pre-Severance implant. Accepted 20-credit bribe for silence. Has seen this hardware before. Nervous.
npcs.last_action: Sent a single deniable warning through a throwaway relay, then cut all residual lines and shifted farther into back-channel shelter routes.
npcs.status: deeper underground; severed remaining casual contact paths after a one-time warning

npcs.name: Mira
npcs.location: Bridgehead District — moved from the pawn-exchange room to a different cash safehouse via intermediary transit
npcs.notes: Was watching alley since 0400 power cut. Knew Ghost would come. Warned that implant will start broadcasting. Has hidden something in the noodle bowl. Knows more than she's saying.
npcs.last_action: Abandoned the rented room above Lao Tze Pawn Exchange before midday and shifted to a fresh compartmented safe site using cutouts.
npcs.status: relocated and dark; reducing exposure after contamination warning
